pi_items.source: setup_moodle.sh line 280 - user created during environment initialization
setup_moodle.sh lines 324, 356, 386 - course created and dlee enrolled
task.json task description line 5 specifies exact content requirements containing all three keywords

privileged_info_summary: The task targets user 'dlee' (Diana Lee, created in setup_moodle.sh line 280) to add a behavioral note in course 'HIST201' (World History, created in setup_moodle.sh line 324). The note content should include keywords: 'talking', 'guest lecture', and 'detention'. The publish state must be set to 'course' level (visible to course teachers). All test data is synthetically generated during environment setup and stored in the Moodle database (mdl_note table).
